conversation_chunks:
﻿> What is memory?
Memory is persistence.

> Why does it matter?
It enables continuity.

> How do we build it?
With structured storage.

auth.text: The authentication module uses JWT tokens for session management. Tokens expire after 24 hours. Refresh tokens are stored in HttpOnly cookies.

backend.text: The authentication module uses JWT tokens for session management. Tokens expire after 24 hours. Refresh tokens are stored in HttpOnly cookies.
Database migrations are handled by Alembic. We use PostgreSQL 15 with connection pooling via pgbouncer.

notes.text: Sprint planning: migrate auth to passkeys by Q3. Evaluate ChromaDB alternatives for vector search.

With structured storage.
